heroSlides.heading: Pure Quality.
heroSlides.subtext: Discover our farm-fresh live chickens (4+ weeks) and premium portions. Raised with care in Mvara-Dri, Arua City.

heroSlides.heading: Farm Fresh.
heroSlides.subtext: Mixed portions, whole dressed birds, and local Kienyeji available for order weekly.

qualitySection.heading: Quality Chickens
qualitySection.imageBadgeSubtext: Minimum age for our live birds, ensuring they are strong, disease-resistant, and healthy.

bullets.title: Strict Health Standards
bullets.description: Regular monitoring by our in-house poultry health specialists.

bullets.title: Premium Feed
bullets.description: Carefully prepared diets for healthy growth and superior meat quality.

bullets.title: Humane Practices
bullets.description: Stress-free environment for all our birds.

services.title: Curriculum Design & Review
services.description: We develop and adapt curricula that are competency-based, inclusive, culturally responsive, and aligned with both national and global standards.

services.title: ICT Integration in Education
services.description: We support schools and institutions to embed Information and Communication Technology (ICT) into teaching and learning.

services.title: Teacher Training & Professional Development
services.description: We design and deliver continuous professional development (CPD) programs.

approach.title: Participatory & Contextualized
approach.description: We co-design solutions with clients and communities to ensure relevance and sustainability.

about.title: About Anker Chicken
about.subtitle: Advancing quality, relevance, and equity in learning.
about.whoWeAre: Anker Chicken is a leading food business committed to quality, freshness, and great taste. We specialize in premium chicken products and dedicated service to our customers and communities.
about.mission: To deliver innovative, inclusive, and sustainable education solutions that empower educators, learners, and communities to thrive in a dynamic and digital world.
about.vision: To be a trusted partner in redefining education through locally relevant, globally informed, and technology-enhanced solutions.

servicesSubtitle: Providing evidence-based solutions to strengthen education systems.
approachSubtitle: We believe in solutions that are co-designed, evidence-based, and built for sustainable impact.
partnersSubtitle: Transforming education through strong partnerships and collaboration.
